name: TRAP CURSOR
description: Trap Cursor: Ultimate Reflex Challenge! Test your speed and precision in this high-stakes survival game! Navigate your cursor through a maze of deadly traps and shifting obstacles. Stay sharp—one mistake is all it takes to get caught. How long can you survive the trap? Fast & Addictive: Quick rounds for non-stop action. Neon Aesthetics: Sleek, high-contrast orange visuals. Challenge Your Limits: Perfect your timing and beat the high score! #TrapCursor #ReflexGame #Arcade #IndieGame #FastPaced #SkillGame #NeonGaming #HighScorer #CursorGame #ReactionTest
instructions: Game Controls For Desktop Spacebar Press the Space button to control your movement and stay safe
